project.name: Banking Playground :: Product Model
project.description: Plain Java records modelling a bank Product (a customer holding/arrangement — account, card, overdraft, loan) and its references. No Spring, no persistence — only Jackson annotations so the same records serialize to canonical JSON (with @type / @baseType / @referredType) and deserialize legacy payloads leniently. Shared by both REST services, the worker and the tests.
